abilities.name: Ready Unit
abilities.text: Ready a level I or II Unit

abilities.name: Move
abilities.text: Move 2. The move cost of forests, hills and swamps is reduced by 1 this turn, to a minimum of 0.

abilities.name: Block
abilities.text: Block 4. Counts twice against an attack with Swiftness.

abilities.name: Attack or Block (Wound)
abilities.text: Attack or Block 6. This Unit becomes Wounded.

abilities.name: Pacify
abilities.text: Target unfortified enemy does not attack this combat.

abilities.name: Gain Crystal
abilities.text: Gain a white crystal to your Inventory.

abilities.name: Scout
abilities.text: Take a look at a face down token within 3 spaces on the map, or at the top token of any unused enemy token pile. If you defeat that token this turn, gain +1 Fame.

abilities.name: Move
abilities.text: Move 2. You may reveal a new tile at a distance of 2 spaces instead of 1.

abilities.name: Ranged Attack
abilities.text: Ranged Attack 1. All your other Units get +1 to all their Attacks this turn.

abilities.name: Weaken
abilities.text: Reduce Armor and one attack of chosen enemy by 1.

abilities.name: Taunt
abilities.text: Reduce one enemy attack by 3. Any damage from that attack must be assigned to this Unit first, even if that enemy had Assassination.

abilities.name: Attack
abilities.text: Attack 3 (+2 if the mana on the card is red)

abilities.name: Block
abilities.text: Block 4 (+3 if the mana on the card is blue)

abilities.name: Move or Influence
abilities.text: Move 3 or Influence 3 (+2 if the mana on the card is white)

abilities.name: Heal
abilities.text: Heal 2 (+1 if the mana on the card is green)
